tasks.label: platypus: py-spy launch (main.py + debugpy)
args: set -euo pipefail; OUT_DIR="${workspaceFolder}/.profiles"; mkdir -p "$OUT_DIR"; OUT_FILE="$OUT_DIR/main-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).svg"; PYSPY="${workspaceFolder}/.pixi/envs/default/bin/py-spy"; PYTHON_BIN="${workspaceFolder}/.pixi/envs/default/bin/python"; export PATH="${workspaceFolder}/.pixi/envs/default/bin:${PATH}"; export CONDA_PREFIX="${workspaceFolder}/.pixi/envs/default"; export CONDA_DEFAULT_ENV="platypus"; export PIXI_PROJECT_ROOT="${workspaceFolder}"; export PYTHONPATH="${workspaceFolder}:${PYTHONPATH:-}"; export LIBRAW_LOCAL_PREFIX="${workspaceFolder}/third_party/libraw-install"; export PKG_CONFIG_PATH="${workspaceFolder}/third_party/libraw-install/lib/pkgconfig:${PKG_CONFIG_PATH:-}"; export PYDEVD_DISABLE_FILE_VALIDATION="1"; export OMP_DISPLAY_ENV="FALSE"; export KMP_WARNINGS="0"; export LIBOMP_VERBOSE="0"; export ENABLE_PJRT_COMPATIBILITY="1"; export PYTORCH_MPS_HIGH_WATERMARK_RATIO="0.0"; export PYTORCH_ENABLE_MPS_FALLBACK="1"; export PYTORCH_MPS_FAST_MATH="1"; export KMP_DUPLICATE_LIB_OK="FALSE"; export DYLD_FALLBACK_LIBRARY_PATH="${workspaceFolder}/third_party/libraw-install/lib:${workspaceFolder}/.pixi/envs/default/lib:/usr/lib:/usr/local/lib:/opt/homebrew/lib"; echo "PYSPY_WAITING"; PYSPY_CMD="$PYSPY"; if [ "$(uname -s)" = "Darwin" ]; then PYSPY_CMD="sudo $PYSPY"; fi; eval "$PYSPY_CMD" record --subprocesses --output "$OUT_FILE" -- "$PYTHON_BIN" -X frozen_modules=off -m debugpy --listen 127.0.0.1:5678 --wait-for-client "${workspaceFolder}/main.py" & CHILD_PID=$!; STARTED=0; for _ in {1..400}; do if lsof -nP -iTCP:5678 -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; then STARTED=1; break; fi; sleep 0.1; done; if [ "$STARTED" -ne 1 ]; then echo "PYSPY_FAILED: debugpy listen timeout (sudo password prompt may still be waiting)"; kill "$CHILD_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; wait "$CHILD_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; exit 1; fi; echo "PYSPY_STARTED pid=$CHILD_PID output=$OUT_FILE"; wait "$CHILD_PID"
